title: EU parliament passes ‘chat control,’ allowing private chat scans until 2028
summary: EU lawmakers have again allowed tech firms to scan chats for abuse material, but exempted end-to-end encrypted messages.

summary: Stocks fell as traders reduced exposure ahead of the weekend, with a fragile truce in the Middle East keeping geopolitical risk in focus.

title: AI Agents Could Be Turned Into Botnets Through Hallucinations, Researchers Warn
summary: Researchers warn AI agents could be tricked into downloading malicious code by exploiting the same hallucinations that cause chatbots to make mistakes.
